workshop.title: Basics
workshop.mission: Create your first FTML page and display a Hello World heading.
instructions: Start the document with the DOCTYPE declaration.
Load the Front runtime script before the body closes.
Add a body section inside it.
Inside the body, add a heading that says Hello World.
hints: Every HTML or FTML document begins with a DOCTYPE declaration.
The Front runtime is loaded using a script tag.
The body element contains everything visible on the page.
Headings are created using the h1 element.
workshop.author: Front Labs

workshop.title: Clipboard
workshop.description: Easily copy, paste, and manage text directly from the application. The Clipboard plugin allows users to quickly copy content to the system clipboard and paste it with a single action, making it simple to reuse text across documents, forms, and external tools. It improves productivity by removing manual selection and streamlining common copy and paste workflows.
workshop.author: Front Labs

workshop.title: Scrollbar
workshop.description: Adds a customizable scrollbar to your application, allowing you to control appearance, size, and behavior. The Scrollbar plugin improves navigation in scrollable content areas by providing smooth scrolling and consistent styling across different browsers and devices.
workshop.author: Front Labs

workshop.title: ResponsiveVoice
workshop.description: Adds text-to-speech functionality using ResponsiveVoice service by responsivevoice.org, allowing your app to read text aloud in multiple languages and voices.
workshop.author: Josef Gabrielsson

workshop.title: Filter Search
workshop.description: The Filter Search plugin lets users instantly narrow down lists or sections by typing a search term. It dynamically shows or hides matching elements and automatically updates counters per section, giving immediate visual feedback. This makes it ideal for large lists, menus, dictionaries, or categorized content where quick filtering and clarity are important.
workshop.author: Josef Gabrielsson

markup.description: Marks an element as a filterable row. No value required.
Groups the row under a named section counter. Value is the counter key, e.g. filtersearch--count="count1".
Placed on the container. Shows the target element when no rows match, hides it otherwise, e.g. filtersearch--onempty="#emptyMessage".

workshop.title: Particles
workshop.description: Bring your page to life with a dynamic particles. This plugin adds configurable and colorful particles that drift downward and subtly follow your mouse movements, creating a lively and interactive effect. You can enjoy a customizable, animated backdrop that makes your content feel more engaging and visually appealing.
workshop.author: Josef Gabrielsson

markup.description: Loads particles inside of the element.

workshop.title: Map
workshop.description: Integrate Google Maps into your application, allowing you to display interactive maps, add markers, routes, and locations. This plugin makes it easy to enhance your app with geolocation features and visual map data.
workshop.author: Josef Gabrielsson
